description: Enforcing regional data residency and geospatial boundary logic per Law 151/2020.

patterns.name: sovereignty-mapping
patterns.logic: Map cloud regions (provider:region) to sovereignty tiers (GLOBAL vs. MENA-SOIL).

patterns.name: residency-policy-enforcement
patterns.logic: Define data tiers (MENA-LOCKED) and validate routing against target shard sovereignty tiers.

corrections.trigger: Attempting to store sensitive Egyptian user data in European shards.
corrections.remediation: Intercept via RegionalController and redirect to MENA-SOIL shards or block access.
